name: NMN middle-aged and elderly trial is recruiting without posted results
summary: Recruiting no-results registry testing nicotinamide mononucleotide in middle-aged and elderly people.
statement: ClinicalTrials.gov lists NCT06592859 as recruiting with 240 estimated participants and no posted results in the June 8, 2026 API view.
population_or_model: Middle-aged and elderly people in an NMN aging trial
quantitative_note: Registry enrollment is 240; result status is not posted.
caveats: Registry status and design do not provide evidence of benefit.
Any future result should be reviewed before changing the outlook.
No-results status is useful watchlist context, not efficacy evidence.
